case_title: NICHOLAS SANDNESS VS. CHRISTINE MELINDA MCVICKER

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-18-2009 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SANDNESS, NICHOLAS AS TO DEFENDANT MCVICKER, CHRISTINE MELINDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF SANDNESS, NICHOLAS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANDNESS, NICHOLAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCVICKER, CHRISTINE MELINDA $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $77.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,077.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MCVICKER, CHRISTINE MELINDA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-05-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MCVICKER, CHRISTINE MELINDA
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-18-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-18-2009 BY MONICA F. WILEY. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
